sections.paragraph:
διϊκνέομαι intr. (Thu. et al.; Ex 26:28) to move through a three-dimensional space, pierce, penetrate Hb 4:12 (Jos., Ant. 13, 96 of missiles; sim. Cornutus 31 p. 63, 22f).—DELG s.v. ἵκω.

intr. intr. = intransitive

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

sim. sim. = similarly

Cornutus Cornutus , I a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 245
